# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for istio egress unrestricted and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-payment-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  hosts:
  - "api.payment-provider.com"
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "payment-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-analytics-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  hosts:
  - "analytics.vendor-platform.io"
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "analytics-service"
  - "reporting-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-notification-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  hosts:
  - "api.notification-service.com"
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "notification-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-postgres-primary
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  hosts:
  - "primary-db.cloud-provider.com"
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 5432
    name: tcp-postgres
    protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "order-service"
  - "inventory-service"
  addresses:
  - 10.200.0.0/24
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-postgres-replica
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  hosts:
  - "replica-db.cloud-provider.com"
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 5432
    name: tcp-postgres
    protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "reporting-service"
  - "analytics-service"
  addresses:
  - 10.201.0.0/24
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-redis-cache
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  hosts:
  - "redis-cluster.cloud-provider.com"
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 6380
    name: tls-redis
    protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "cache-service"
  - "session-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-mongodb
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  hosts:
  - "mongodb-atlas.cloud-provider.com"
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 27017
    name: tcp-mongo
    protocol: TLS
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "catalog-service"
  - "user-service"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-external-payment-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  hosts:
  - "api.payment-provider.com"
  exportTo:
  - "payment-service"
  tls:
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - "api.payment-provider.com"
    route:
    - destination:
        host: "api.payment-provider.com"
        port:
          number: 443
      weight: 100
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-external-analytics-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  hosts:
  - "analytics.vendor-platform.io"
  exportTo:
  - "analytics-service"
  - "reporting-service"
  tls:
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - "analytics.vendor-platform.io"
    route:
    - destination:
        host: "analytics.vendor-platform.io"
        port:
          number: 443
      weight: 100
  timeout: 10s
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-external-notification-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  hosts:
  - "api.notification-service.com"
  exportTo:

  tls:
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - "api.notification-service.com"
    route:
    - destination:
        host: "api.notification-service.com"
        port:
          number: 443
      weight: 100

      weight: 100
  timeout: 30s

metadata:
  name: vs-external-mongodb
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  hosts:
  - "mongodb-atlas.cloud-provider.com"
  exportTo:

  - "user-service"
  tls:
  - match:
    - port: 27017
      sniHosts:
      - "mongodb-atlas.cloud-provider.com"
    route:
    - destination:
        host: "mongodb-atlas.cloud-provider.com"
        port:
          number: 27017
      weight: 100
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: dr-external-payment-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  host: "api.payment-provider.com"
  exportTo:
  - "payment-service"
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: "api.payment-provider.com"
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 50
        connectTimeout: 5s
      http:
        h2UpgradePolicy: DO_NOT_UPGRADE
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 100
        maxRetries: 3
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 3
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 60s
      maxEjectionPercent: 100
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: dr-external-analytics-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  host: "analytics.vendor-platform.io"
  exportTo:
  - "analytics-service"
  - "reporting-service"
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: "analytics.vendor-platform.io"
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 30
        connectTimeout: 5s
      http:
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 50
        maxRetries: 2
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
      maxEjectionPercent: 100
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: dr-external-notification-api
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: third-party-api
spec:
  host: "api.notification-service.com"
  exportTo:
  - "notification-service"
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: "api.notification-service.com"
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 20
        connectTimeout: 5s
      http:
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 50
        maxRetries: 2
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
      maxEjectionPercent: 100
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: dr-external-postgres-primary
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  host: "primary-db.cloud-provider.com"
  exportTo:
  - "order-service"
  - "inventory-service"
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: "primary-db.cloud-provider.com"
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
        connectTimeout: 10s
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 2
      interval: 10s
      baseEjectionTime: 120s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: dr-external-postgres-replica
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  host: "replica-db.cloud-provider.com"
  exportTo:
  - "reporting-service"
  - "analytics-service"
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: "replica-db.cloud-provider.com"
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 80
        connectTimeout: 10s
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 3
      interval: 15s
      baseEjectionTime: 60s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: dr-external-redis-cache
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  host: "redis-cluster.cloud-provider.com"
  exportTo:
  - "cache-service"
  - "session-service"
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: "redis-cluster.cloud-provider.com"
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 200
        connectTimeout: 3s
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 3
      interval: 10s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: dr-external-mongodb
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: egress-config
    category: external-database
spec:
  host: "mongodb-atlas.cloud-provider.com"
  exportTo:
  - "catalog-service"
  - "user-service"
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: "mongodb-atlas.cloud-provider.com"
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
        connectTimeout: 10s
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 3
      interval: 15s
      baseEjectionTime: 60s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
---
# Sidecar resource to enforce egress restrictions at the mesh level.
# This ensures that workloads can only reach explicitly defined ServiceEntries
# and prevents unrestricted egress to arbitrary external hosts.
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: default-sidecar
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  outboundTrafficPolicy:
    mode: REGISTRY_ONLY
  egress:
  - hosts:
    - "istio-system/*"
    - "./*"
---
# Namespace-scoped Sidecar for payment-service to restrict egress to only allowed hosts
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: payment-service-sidecar
  namespace: payment-service
spec:
  outboundTrafficPolicy:
    mode: REGISTRY_ONLY
  egress:
  - hosts:
    - "istio-system/external-payment-api"
    - "./*"
---
# Namespace-scoped Sidecar for analytics-service
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: analytics-service-sidecar
  namespace: analytics-service
spec:
  outboundTrafficPolicy:
    mode: REGISTRY_ONLY
  egress:
  - hosts:
    - "istio-system/external-analytics-api"
    - "istio-system/external-postgres-replica"
    - "./*"
---
# Namespace-scoped Sidecar for reporting-service
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: reporting-service-sidecar
  namespace: reporting-service
spec:
  outboundTrafficPolicy:
    mode: REGISTRY_ONLY
  egress:
  - hosts:
    - "istio-system/external-analytics-api"
    - "istio-system/external-postgres-replica"
    - "./*"
---
# Namespace-scoped Sidecar for notification-service
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: notification-service-sidecar
  namespace: notification-service
spec:
  outboundTrafficPolicy:
    mode: REGISTRY_ONLY
  egress:
  - hosts:
    - "istio-system/external-notification-api"
    - "./*"
---
# Namespace-scoped Sidecar for order-service
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: order-service-sidecar
  namespace: order-service
spec:
  outboundTrafficPolicy:
    mode: REGISTRY_ONLY
  egress:
  - hosts:
    - "istio-system/external-postgres-primary"
    - "./*"
---
# Namespace-scoped Sidecar for inventory-service
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: inventory-service-sidecar
  namespace: inventory-service
spec:
  outboundTrafficPolicy:
    mode: REGISTRY_ONLY
  egress:
  - hosts:
    - "istio-system/external-postgres-primary"
    - "./*"
---
# Namespace-scoped Sidecar for cache-service
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: cache-service-sidecar
  namespace: cache-service
spec:
  outboundTrafficPolicy:
    mode: REGISTRY_ONLY
  egress:
  - hosts:
    - "istio-system/external-redis-cache"
    - "./*"
---
# Namespace-scoped Sidecar for session-service
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: session-service-sidecar
  namespace: session-service
spec:
  outboundTrafficPolicy:
    mode: REGISTRY_ONLY
  egress:
  - hosts:
    - "istio-system/external-redis-cache"
    - "./*"
---
# Namespace-scoped Sidecar for catalog-service
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: catalog-service-sidecar
  namespace: catalog-service
spec:
  outboundTrafficPolicy:
    mode: REGISTRY_ONLY
  egress:
  - hosts:
    - "istio-system/external-mongodb"
    - "./*"
---
# Namespace-scoped Sidecar for user-service
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: user-service-sidecar
  namespace: user-service
spec:
  outboundTrafficPolicy:
    mode: REGISTRY_ONLY
  egress:
  - hosts:
    - "istio-system/external-mongodb"
    - "./*"
---
# AuthorizationPolicy to enforce egress access control at the workload level
# Deny all egress by default for workloads not explicitly allowed
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: deny-all-egress-default
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  action: DENY
  rules:
  - to:
    - operation:
        notHosts:
        - "api.payment-provider.com"
        - "analytics.vendor-platform.io"
        - "api.notification-service.com"
        - "primary-db.cloud-provider.com"
        - "replica-db.cloud-provider.com"
        - "redis-cluster.cloud-provider.com"
        - "mongodb-atlas.cloud-provider.com"
        notPorts:
        - "443"
        - "5432"
        - "6380"
        - "27017"
---
# PeerAuthentication to enforce mTLS for all mesh traffic
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: default-mtls
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT
